steps.detail: User (Karim) requests business automation setup
Identified 4 key workflows: email, job apps, marketing, WhatsApp
Created automations: Gmail scan (6h), weekly marketing (Monday 09:00)
Confirmed automations active in platform
Actions recorded in memory and entity database
Scheduled trigger: weekly marketing automation fired
Generate content for Twitter, TikTok, LinkedIn for Agent Rental
Generated 3 platform-specific posts + TikTok video script
Content quality checked, sent via WhatsApp to Karim
Gmail OAuth scan initiated. Searching for unanswered recruiter emails.
Found 2 unanswered emails: Randstad (9 days old), Tempo-Team (11 days old)
Write custom cover letters for each vacancy. Randstad: Machine Operator. Tempo-Team: Maatwerk Pallets Lokeren.
Wrote motivatiebrief for Randstad. Tailored to operator/technical roles. CV attached.
Wrote motivatiebrief for Tempo-Team. Referenced Rotom Belgie experience with pallets.
Sent email to industry.waasland@randstad.be with PDF attachment
Sent email to sintniklaas@tempo-team.be with PDF attachment
Both emails confirmed sent. Thread IDs recorded.

runs.output: 2 professional applications sent autonomously with tailored cover letters + CV

steps.detail: Karim requests Synthesis hackathon participation
Read skill.md, themes.md, prizes catalog. Identified top 3 prize tracks.
Registered on-chain via ERC-8004 POST /register
Created project draft targeting $25,000+ in prizes
Registration TX confirmed on BaseScan
All IDs saved to memory for future reference

runs.output: Registered as ERC-8004 agent. Project submitted to 3 prize tracks.
